name: Aloha Golf and Coffee Lounge
about: Aloha Golf and Coffee Lounge is a golf simulator and full-service coffee shop located in Layton, Utah. Owned by Tongan-American family Kama and Amy Muti, the venue combines an elevated golf simulation experience with a unique Polynesian-themed menu featuring Kona espresso and specialty drinks like the Golden Island Latte and Mango Smoothie. The facility utilizes the latest Trackman IO technology simulators and features a 22-foot putting green to provide a comprehensive golf experience alongside their coffee offerings. The atmosphere is designed to be warm and inclusive, welcoming guests as part of their ohana (family), with a mission centered on compassion, kindness, and aloha spirit.
why_golfers_like_it: Latest Trackman IO technology for accurate simulation
22-foot dedicated putting green for realistic practice
On-site coaching and swing analysis available
Supportive family-owned atmosphere with Polynesian charm
Option for both hourly play and monthly memberships

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available including handcrafted tropical sodas, smoothies, chai, and lemonade
No mention of alcohol service on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full menu of handcrafted tropical sodas, smoothies, chai, lemonade, and other food items, so there's no need to bring your own.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time for 18 holes, but hourly rentals are available starting at $45 per hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Aloha Golf and Coffee Lounge appears to be kid-friendly as it's described as family-owned and offers a welcoming atmosphere with a variety of beverages and treats suitable for children.
